description: DOES YOUR BABY DROOL CONSTANTLY AND IS ALWAYS HAVING TO WEAR A BIB THAT COVERS HIS CUTE OUTFIT? As a parent aren’t you tired of... - Baby bibs that are unsafe, uncomfortable, and plain ugly? - Bibs with a plastic backing that have a crunchy feel and sound to them? And some can even be dangerous to your little one? - Bibs that are so stiff that don’t lie flat on your baby’s chest and always seem to be bunched up in their face? - Bibs that aren’t absorbent at all? If you answered yes to any of these questions, then we have the solution for you! Our Baby Bandana Bib is a great alternative to the traditional baby bib… why? Our Baby Bibs: - Easy and good quality velco, long time lasting and easy operation - Are made of 80% cotton+20% polyester - Are soft and comfortable to wear - Don’t cover up a baby’s outfit but accessorize it - Keep a baby dry longer - help protect against drool rash and reflux - Look cool and fashionable unlike a regular bib - Are great for droolers and teething babies. They are the perfect drool bibs! WASH TIPS: BIBS WITH VELCO SHOULD CLOSE UP BEFORE WASHING TO AVOID STICK OTHER STUFF
